title: polypogon tenellus
intro: Polypogon tenellus, also known as fine leaved hair grass or red fescue, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypogon tenellus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Polypogon tenellus is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal remedies, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to salves and creams for topical application.
